title: Maiyaa Maiyaa Lyrics Guru
stanzas:
naan seeniyil seitha kadal
naan seeniyil seitha kadal
vellai thangathil seitha udal
vellai thangathil seitha udal
un kadhali naane
kadhal naane ...

naan muththam thinbaval
oru murattu poo ival
naan thinamum thorpaval
andha aadai sandaiyil

naan muththam thinbaval
oru murattu poo ival
thinam aadai sandiyile
mudhalil thorpaval.

thiri kuraiyattum
kural vilakku
nee idamsutti
porul vilakku.

ada kadavulai
adaiyum vazhiyil
en peyar ezhuthirukku.

maiyaa maiyaa
nilaavai vannam
poosi vaithukol.

maiyaa maiyaa
en udalinil
olivitta malargalum
poiyaa poiyaa

naan punnagai
seithaal podhum
ada dhisaigal
kuraindhida koodum
en karbame
en kreedame.

enai paarthathume
en kannaadi
enai kadhalikkum

ada pengalai thirudum
pala aangalai vellai
aaradi aayudhum aavene.

menkaatril en moochu
sila yugamaai veesum.
ini naalum en kudalil
pala kookookal koovum.

kamaa kamaa idhu podhumaa
en paarvai oliyai
kaalangal thaedum

mai mai maiyaa
mai mai maiyaa

naan muththam thinbaval
oru murattu poo ival
thinam aadai sandiyile
mudhalil thorpaval.

thiri kuraiyattum
kural vilakku
nee idamsutti
porul vilakku.

ada kadavulai
adaiyum vazhiyil
en peyar ezhuthirukku.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Maiyaa Maiyaa'?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics and melody.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Guru'?

In Guru, the song reflects the romantic journey of the characters, highlighting their emotional connection.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Maiyaa Maiyaa'?

The song is sung by Chinmayi and composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was 'Maiyaa Maiyaa' released?

The song was released on November 18, 2006.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Maiyaa Maiyaa', the listener is taken on a melodic journey that encapsulates the essence of love and devotion. The song beautifully portrays the emotions of longing and affection, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. With its soothing composition by AR Rahman and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This enchanting track is a standout moment in the film Guru, resonating with anyone who has experienced the magic of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Maiyaa Maiyaa from Guru is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Chinmayi's enchanting vocals and AR Rahman's magical composition, this song transports listeners to a world of romance. Experience the beauty of this heartfelt track that resonates with emotions and memories.
stanzaMeanings: I am the love that you created in your dreams, I am the love that you created in your dreams, in the white gold, I am the body you created in the white gold, I am your lover, I am love.
I am a flower that you kiss, I am the one who brings joy every day, in that dress fight.
I am a flower that you kiss, I am the one who brings joy every day, in that dress fight, I am the first to bring joy.
Even if there are shortcomings, your voice lights up, you bring forth the essence.
Oh God, my name is written on the path you take.
Mother, mother, I have painted the moon with colors.
Mother, mother, the flowers that bloomed in me are all false.
If I smile, it is enough, the directions will come together, my womb, my play.
When you look at me, my mirror loves me.
Oh, the girls steal many things, white weapons will come.
In the wind, my breath will blow for ages. From now on, many calls will echo in my heart.
Is this enough, my gaze will seek the times.
I am a flower that you kiss, I am the one who brings joy every day, in that dress fight, I am the first to bring joy.
Even if there are shortcomings, your voice lights up, you bring forth the essence.
Oh God, my name is written on the path you take.
